name: Harpak
description: Spike enemies to the wall or reel them in with this burst harpoon gun.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Spike enemies to the wall or reel them in with this burst harpoon gun.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.1.2 + 25.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Harpak chain sticking around for long periods.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Harpak doing more damage than depicted in the Conclave Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error with the Harpak’s Alt Fire.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Javlok, Buzlok, Ferrox, Harpak, Hind, Mutalist Quanta, Penthera, Paracyst, Penta, Quanta (Vandal), Stradavar, Tenora, Zarr
The Harpak's stats aren't the worst in the scheme of Primaries, but it has received some love since it is often overlooked.
Adjusted pull strength of the Harpak’s alt fire to have enemies more likely to end up near you.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed punch-through Mods disabling the Harpak and Paracyst’s alt-fire.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed the Terminal Velocity Mod not being usable on the Harpak.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Clients using the Harpak experiencing firing delays that would prevent use of the alt fire.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the volume of audio effects on the Harpak.
